data.name: YOUMUSTSELECTADEFAULTWAREHOUSE
data.value: You must select a default warehouse.

data.name: TOCONTINUEYOUMUSTCOMPLETETHEINFORMATIONINTHEBASEPROFILESSECTION
data.value: To continue, you must complete the information in the Base profiles section.

data.name: DECIMALSEPARATORMUSTBEDIFFERENTFROMTHOUSANDSSEPARATOR_
data.value: Decimal separator must be different from thousands separator.

data.name: _YOUMUSTSELECTADEFAULTWAREHOUSE
data.value: * You must select a default warehouse

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETE_0__
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0}?

data.name: _TOCONTINUE_YOUMUSTCOMPLETETHEINFORMATIONINTHEBASEPROFILESSECTION_
data.value: * To continue, you must complete the information in the Base profiles section.

data.name: ITISNOTPOSSIBLETODELETETHISPROFILE_ITISLINKEDTOANOTHERREGISTRY_
data.value: It is not possible to delete this profile, it is linked to another registry.

data.name: YOUHAVEUNSAVEDCHANGES_AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTOLEAVEANDDISCARDTHEM_
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave and discard them?

data.name: _STARTCANNOTBEGREATERTHANEND
data.value: * Start cannot be greater than End

data.name: RESOURCESBYPROCESSES
data.value: Shows the number of resources needed for each process (e.g., inbound or shipping), helping plan and allocate resources efficiently.

data.name: RESOURCESUTILIZATION
data.value: Represents the percentage of available resources being used. It highlights efficiency and helps detect whether resources are over- or underutilized.

data.name: AREAUTILIZATION
data.value: Shows the percentage of space used in different warehouse areas, helping to maximize efficiency and prevent congestion.

data.name: WORKTIME_MIN_BYWORKERANDPROCESS
data.value: Work time (min) by worker and process

data.name: WFMLABORWORKERPERPROCESSDESC
data.value: Shows the time (in minutes) each worker spends on different processes, allowing comparison of workload distribution and identify where time is being invested across tasks.

data.name: TOP10WORKERSWITHLESSWORKTIME_MIN_
data.value: Top 10 workers with less work time (min)

data.name: WORKFORCEVSAVAILABILITY___BYROLEANDHOUR
data.value: Workforce vs availability (%) by role and hour

data.name: WORKFORCEVSAVAILABILITYDESC
data.value: Shows workforce utilization versus availability by role and hour, highlighting periods of over- or underutilization.

data.name: PROCESSESUSEDSTATUSWIDGETS
data.value: Lists the start and end times of each process along with its type. This allows detailed tracking of process execution and supports performance analysis.

data.name: PROCESSINTERLEAVINGS
data.value: Visualizes the distribution of time across activities—Inbound, Outbound, Interleaving, and Inactive—highlighting how time is spent between processes and potential inefficiencies.

data.name: RESOURCESUSAGES
data.value: Shows the current number of resources in use, giving a quick overview of workforce or equipment engagement at any given time.

data.name: WFMLABORWORKERDESC
data.value: Shows key performance indicators – Efficiency, Productivity and Utilization – for each team and worker, giving a quick view of performance against expectations.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETE_0_ITEMS_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} items?

data.name: YOUCANNOTCREATETWOCONFIGURATIONSWITHOVERLAPPINGDATES_
data.value: It is not possible to create two configurations with overlapping dates.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETECONFIGURATION__0__
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete configuration: {0} ?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTOCANCEL
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel?

data.name: THEORDERWILLBEREMOVEDFROMTHEPLANNING_
data.value: The order will be removed from the Planning.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETETHEFILTER_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the filter?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETE
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETETHEBREAKPROFILE__0___
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the break profile {0}?

data.name: ORDER_WMSCODE_GENERATEDANALERTWITHTHECONDITIONS_FIELD__OPERATOR__REFERENCE_
data.value: Order [WMSCode] generated an alert with the conditions [Field] [Operator] [Reference].

data.name: ITISNOTPOSSIBLETOSELECTASTARTHOURPREVIOUSTHANNOW_
data.value: It is not possible to select a start hour previous than now.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETE_0_ALERT_1__
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} alert{1}?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODISABLEUSER_
data.value: Are you sure you want to disable user?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTOENABLEUSER_
data.value: Are you sure you want to enable user?

data.name: THEORDERWILLBEREMOVEDFROMTHEPLANNING_THISACTIONISIRREVERSIBLE_
data.value: The order will be removed from the planning. This action is irreversible.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTOREMOVETHENEXTORDERSFROMTHEPLANNING__
data.value: Are you sure you want to exclude the orders from planning?

data.name: DOYOUWANTLOCKTHENEXTORDERS_
data.value: Do you want to lock the following orders?

data.name: AVERAGENUMBEROFLINESPERORDER
data.value: Average number of lines per order

data.name: TOCREATEAPROCESSDIRECTION_YOUMUSTFIRSTCREATEAPROCESS_
data.value: To create a process direction, you must first create a process.

data.name: TOCREATEAZONE_YOUMUSTFIRSTCREATEANAREA_
data.value: To create a zone, you must first create an area.

data.name: TOCREATEALOCATIONZONES_SELECTANAREA_IFONEISN_TCREATED_YOUMUSTCREATEONE_
data.value: To create a location zones, select an area. If one isn't created, you must create one.

data.name: TOCREATEAEQUIPMENT_YOUMUSTFIRSTCREATEANAREA_
data.value: To create an equipment, you must first create an area.

data.name: TOCREATEAROUTE_YOUMUSTFIRSTCREATEANAREA_
data.value: To create a route, you must first create an area.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETETHESELECTEDOBJECT_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected element?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTOREVERTTHECHANGESTOTHELASTSAVEDPOINT_
data.value: Are you sure you want to revert the changes to the last saved point?

data.name: ORDER_0_CANNOTBEREPRIORITIZEDBECAUSEITHASALREADYBEENSTARTED_COMPLETEDORBLOCKED_
data.value: Order {0} cannot be reprioritized because it has already been started, completed or blocked.

data.name: DOYOUWANTTOREPRIORITIZETHEOTHERSELECTEDORDERS_0__
data.value: Do you want to reprioritize the other selected orders {0} ?

data.name: ORDER_0_CANNOTBECANCELEDBECAUSEITHASALREADYBEENSTARTED_COMPLETEDORBLOCKED_
data.value: Order {0} cannot be canceled because it has already been started, completed or blocked.

data.name: DOYOUWANTTOCANCELTHEOTHERSELECTEDORDERS_0__
data.value: Do you want to cancel the other selected orders {0} ?

data.name: ORDERS_0_CANNOTBEBLOCKEDBECAUSETHEYHAVEALREADYBEENSTARTEDORCOMPLETED_
data.value: Orders {0} cannot be blocked because they have already been started or completed.

data.name: DOYOUWANTTOBLOCKTHEOTHERSELECTEDORDERS_0__
data.value: Do you want to block the other selected orders {0} ?

data.name: ORDERS_0_CANNOTBEREPRIORITIZEDBECAUSETHEYHAVEALREADYBEENSTARTED_COMPLETEDORBLOCKED_
data.value: Orders {0} cannot be reprioritized because they have already been started, completed or blocked.

data.name: DOYOUWANTTOREPRIORITIZETHEOTHERSELECTEDORDER_0__
data.value: Do you want to reprioritize the other selected order {0} ?

data.name: ORDER_0_CANNOTBEBLOCKEDBECAUSEITHASALREADYBEENSTARTEDORCOMPLETED_
data.value: Order {0} cannot be blocked because it has already been started or completed.

data.name: DOYOUWANTTOBLOCKTHEOTHERSELECTEDORDER_0__
data.value: Do you want to block the other selected order {0} ?

data.name: DOYOUWANTTOCANCELTHEOTHERSELECTEDORDER_0__
data.value: Do you want to cancel the other selected order {0} ?

data.name: ORDERS_0_CANNOTBECANCELEDBECAUSETHEYHAVEALREADYBEENSTARTED_COMPLETEDORBLOCKED_
data.value: Orders {0} cannot be canceled because they have already been started, completed or blocked.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTOUNLOCKTHEORDERS_0__
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlock the orders {0} ?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTOUNLOCKTHEORDER_0__
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlock the order {0} ?

data.name: DOYOUWANTTOSAVETHECHANGESBEFOREEXITING_
data.value: Do you want to save the changes before exiting?

data.name: ROLES_NO_FOR_PROCESS
data.value: There are no roles assigned to run the process {0}. Roles must be configured in Work Profiles > Base Profiles.

data.name: WORKERS_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: There are no workers configured for the warehouse. Workers must be configured in Work Profiles > Worker Profiles.

data.name: EQUIPMENTS_TYPE_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: There is no equipment configured. Equipment types must be configured in Work Profiles > Equipment Profiles.

data.name: FLOW_NO_ORDER_SCHEDULES
data.value: There are no order schedules configured. The property must be configured in Logistics Profiles > Order Profiles.

data.name: PROCESS_NO_ENDING
data.value: There are no end processes configured to terminate the simulation. The end property must be configured in the process direction property.

data.name: PROCESS_NO_TIME
data.value: The {0} process does not have a preprocessing, processing and postprocessing time configured. The time must be configured in the process properties.

data.name: PROCESS_NO_LOAD_PROFILE
data.value: There are no load profiles configured. Load profiles must be configured in Logistics Profiles > Load Profiles.

data.name: ZONE_NO_CONTAINERS_CAPACITY
data.value: Zone {0} does not have a maximum container capacity configured. The maximum container capacity property for zones must be greater than 0 and must be configured in the designer.

data.name: BUFFER_ZERO_CAPACITY
data.value: The buffer {0} is configured with equipment capacity 0. The equipment capacity property in the buffer zone should be greater than 0 and must be configured in the zone properties.

data.name: DOCK_ZERO_CAPACITY
data.value: The dock {0} is configured with equipment capacity 0. The equipment capacity property must be greater than 0 and must be configured in the designer.

data.name: AREA_NO_ZONES
data.value: Area {0} has no zones configured. The zones must be created in the designer.

data.name: ROUTE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: There is no route from area {0} to area {1}. The route must be configured in the designer.

data.name: AREAS_NOT_CREATED
data.value: There are no areas created for this warehouse. The areas must be created in the designer.

data.name: ROUTES_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: There are no configured routes between areas. Routes must be configured in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_NO_OUTBOUND
data.value: It is not possible to assign outbound docks for the process {0}. The outbound property for docks must be configured in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_NO_INBOUND
data.value: It is not possible to assign inbound docks for the process {0}. The inbound property for docks must be configured in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_NO_INBOUND_RANGES
data.value: There are no ranges configured for inbound docks. The range for the inbound property in docks must be configured in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_DUPLICATE_INBOUND_RANGES
data.value: There are repeating ranges for inbound docks. The range property on docks should not be repeated and must be configured in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_NO_OUTBOUND_RANGES
data.value: There are no ranges configured for outbound docks. The range for the outbound property in docks must be configured in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_DUPLICATE_OUTBOUND_RANGES
data.value: There are repeating ranges for outbound docks. The range property on docks should not be repeated and must be configured in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_NO_SELECTION_STRATEGY
data.value: There is no dock selection strategy available for inflow or outflow. The dock type selection must be configured in the flow properties.

data.name: AISLE_ZERO_CAPACITY
data.value: Aisle {0} is configured with capacity 0. The capacity property for corridors should be greater than 0 and must be configured in the zone properties.

data.name: NARROW_AISLE_ZERO_PICKERS
data.value: Narrow aisle {0} is configured with capacity 0. The capacity property for narrow aisle should be greater than 0 and must be configured in the zone properties.

data.name: AUTO_STORAGE_ZERO_CAPACITY
data.value: Automatic storage zone {0} is configured with capacity 0. The capacity property for the automatic storage zone should be greater than 0 and must be configured in zone properties.

data.name: CHAOTIC_STORAGE_ZERO_CAPACITY
data.value: The chaotic storage zone {0} is configured with capacity 0. The capacity property in the chaotic storage zone should be greater than 0 and must be configured in the zone properties.

data.name: DRIVEIN_ZERO_CAPACITY
data.value: The drive-in storage zone {0} is configured with capacity 0. The capacity property on the drive-in storage zone should be greater than 0 and must be configured in the zone properties.

data.name: RACK_ZERO_CAPACITY
data.value: The rack storage zone {0} is configured with capacity 0. The capacity property on the rack storage zone should be greater than 0 and must be configured in the zone properties.

data.name: FLOW_NO_INBOUND_GRAPH
data.value: There is no inbound flow configured. The inbound must be configured in the designer.

data.name: FLOW_INBOUND_NO_MAX_TIME
data.value: The inbound flow {0} does not have a maximum vehicle time in dock configured. The maximum time per vehicle property for the flow must be configured in the designer.

data.name: FLOW_INBOUND_NO_STRATEGY
data.value: The inbound flow {0} has no docks with a strategy assigned for this flow. The "Allow inbound" property for docks in the inbound flow must be configured in the designer.

data.name: FLOW_INBOUND_NO_AVERAGE_LINES
data.value: There are no average lines per order configured for inboundflow {0}. The average lines per order property must be configured in the flow properties.

data.name: FLOW_NO_OUTBOUND_GRAPH
data.value: There is no outbound flow configured. The inbound must be configured in the designer.

data.name: FLOW_OUTBOUND_NO_MAX_TIME
data.value: The outbound flow {0} does not have a maximum vehicle time in dock configured. The maximum time per vehicle property for the flow must be configured in the designer.

data.name: FLOW_OUTBOUND_NO_STRATEGY
data.value: The outbound flow {0} has no docks with a strategy assigned for this flow. The dock type selection must be configured in the flow properties.

data.name: FLOW_OUTBOUND_NO_AVERAGE_LINES
data.value: There are no average lines per order configured for outboundflow {0}. The average lines per order property must be configured in the flow properties.

data.name: FLOW_NO_PROCESS_PRIORITIES
data.value: There are no roles assigned to the processes. Roles must be configured in Work Profiles > Base Profiles.

data.name: PROCESS_NO_INITIAL
data.value: There are no initial processes configured to start the simulation. The started property must be configured in the process properties.

data.name: PROCESS_INIT_PERCENTAGE_INVALID
data.value: The percentage of the initial process {0} must be greater than 0. The percentage must be set in the process properties.

data.name: PROCESS_DIRECTION_PERCENTAGE_INVALID
data.value: The execution probability percentage for {0} must be greater than 0. The execution percentage must be configured in the process address properties.

data.name: PROCESS_INIT_NO_PATHS
data.value: The initial process {0} has no routes assigned. Routes for the process flow must be configured in the designer.

data.name: PROCESS_PATH_NO_END
data.value: Process {0} has no routes configured to process {1}. Routes must be configured in the designer.

data.name: PROCESS_NO_VEHICLE_PROFILE
data.value: There are no vehicle profiles configured. Vehicle profiles must be configured in Logistics Profiles > Load profiles.

data.name: PROCESS_NO_ORDER_LOAD_RATIOS
data.value: There are no order loading profiles configured. Order loading profiles must be configured in Logistics Profiles > Order profiles.

data.name: PROCESS_SAME_DIRECTIONPROPERTY
data.value: Process {0} has at least one process direction to himself. These directions must be deleted.

data.name: WORKERS_NO_ROLES_FOR_PROCESS
data.value: There are no workers assigned roles to run the process {0}. Workers must be configured in Work Profiles > Worker Profiles.

data.name: EQUIPMENTS_NOT_IN_AREA
data.value: There is no equipment assigned to area {0}. The equipment must be configured in Work Profiles > Equipment Profiles.

data.name: EQUIPMENTS_GROUP_EMPTY
data.value: The equipment group {0} has 0 pieces of equipment assigned. Equipment groups must be configured in Work Profiles > Equipment Profiles.

data.name: AREAWHEREGOODSARERECEIVEDORSHIPPED_USUALLYLINKEDTOINBOUNDOROUTBOUNDFLOWS_
data.value: Area where goods are received or shipped, usually linked to inbound or outbound flows.

data.name: AREAUSEDTOSTOREPRODUCTSORMATERIALSFORMEDIUMORLONG_TERMPERIODS_
data.value: Area used to store products or materials for medium or long-term periods.

data.name: TEMPORARYHOLDINGAREAUSEDTOMANAGEFLOWIMBALANCESBETWEENPROCESSES_
data.value: Temporary holding area used to manage flow imbalances between processes.

data.name: PREPARATIONAREAWHEREGOODSAREORGANIZEDBEFORETHENEXTPROCESSSTEP_E_G__PACKING_LOADING__
data.value: Preparation area where goods are organized before the next process step (e.g., packing, loading).

data.name: _THEORDERNUMBERISALREADYINUSE
data.value: * The order number is already in use

data.name: ROUTES_NOT_CREATED
data.value: There are no routes created for this warehouse. The routes must be created in the designer.

data.name: ZONES_NOT_CREATED
data.value: There are no zones created for this warehouse. The zones must be created in the designer.

data.name: DOCKS_NOT_CREATED
data.value: There are no docks created for this warehouse. The docks must be created in the designer.

data.name: ZONE_NO_EQUIPMENTS_CAPACITY
data.value: Zone {0} is configured with maximum equipment 0. The max equipment property should be greater than 0 and must be configured in the zone properties.

data.name: STAGE_NO_DOCKS
data.value: Zone {0} has no associated docks. Stages must have at least 1 dock associated. Docks for stages must be associated in the designer.

data.name: STAGE_NO_FLOWS
data.value: Zone {0} has no active flow. Stages must have at least 1 active flow. Flows for stages must be activated in the designer.

data.name: OUTBOUND_NO_GRAPH
data.value: There is no outbound flow created while outbound work load is. Flows must be created in the designer and must be unique.

data.name: INBOUND_NO_GRAPH
data.value: There is no inbound flow created while inbound work load is. Flows must be created in the designer and must be unique.

data.name: OUTBOUNDFLOW_NOT_UNIQUE
data.value: There are more than 1 outbound flow created. Flows must be unique. Flows must be deleted in the designer.

data.name: INBOUNDFLOW_NOT_UNIQUE
data.value: There are more than 1 inbound flow created. Flows must be unique. Flows must be deleted in the designer.

data.name: THENAMEISALREADYINUSE_SUGGESTIONS__0_
data.value: The name is already in use. Suggestions: {0}

data.name: _TOCONTINUE_YOUMUSTCREATEPROCESSESINTHEDESIGNERFORTHISWAREHOUSE_
data.value: * To continue, you must create processes in the designer for this warehouse.

data.name: _TOCONTINUE_YOUMUSTCREATEAREASINTHEDESIGNERFORTHISWAREHOUSE_
data.value: * To continue, you must create areas in the designer for this warehouse.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETEANORDERPROFILE_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete an order profile?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETE_0_ORDERPROFILES_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} order profiles?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETEALOADPROFILE_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete a load profile?

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETE_0_LOADPROFILES_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} load profiles?

data.name: ITISNOTPOSSIBLETODELETETHE_0_FLOWBECAUSEITHASLINKEDPROCESSES_
data.value: It is not possible to delete the {0} flow because it has linked processes.

data.name: AREYOUSUREYOUWANTTODELETETHE_0_FLOW_
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the {0} flow?

data.name: NOORDERINCIDENTS_DESCRIPTION
data.value: There are no incidents for current planification

data.name: SIMULATION_TRIGGER_MESSAGE
data.value: This action will launch a simulation that may take several seconds.

data.name: YOUAREABOUTTOREMOVE_0_SELECTEDITEMS_
data.value: You are about to remove {0} selected items.

data.name: CHANGESAREPENDING_CONFIRMTHEMUSINGTHESAVEBUTTON_
data.value: Changes are pending. Confirm them using the save button.

data.name: DXBLAZORSTRINGID_GRID_GROUPPANEL
data.value: Drag a column header here to group
